paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, which represents a 2.02% increase from the prior close. Over a window of 20 sessions, the stock price has decreased by 36.32%. The price data is as of July 17, 2026.

Recent news headlines have focused on the company's governance and a recent convertible note offering. On July 16, 2026, Yahoo Finance and Yahoo Finance UK reported on the resignation of director Miles Everson, citing disagreements over governance practices and access to board records. The news outlets also discussed the company's convertible note offering, which was completed earlier in July 2026.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K filing on July 15, 2026, which disclosed the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Another 8-K filing on July 13, 2026, disclosed the resignation of director Miles Everson. There has been one Form 4 filing, but no Form 144 filings.
